_meta.purpose: Per-company skill-portability seed for lib/wealth-ranking.mjs. Each value is 0-10 representing how transferable Mitchell's skill set is to non-tech high-WTP sectors (finance, health, legal) by way of working at this company. Higher = more transferable.
_meta.rubric: 10 = product/skills directly portable to finance/health freelance (e.g., comms × AI deployment). 7-9 = strong AI-native but narrower vertical. 4-6 = transferable but requires re-platforming. 0-3 = niche tech-internal skill set.
_meta.source: Seed values derived from data/career-calibration-20260516-190152.md + data/overpay-signals/CURRENT.md. Override as live data sharpens.
